subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Amvaj (Tablet of the Waves)
subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book is standing in this Day before the gaze of all the peoples and kindreds of the earth, magnifying the glory of Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ام الکتاب امام وجوه احزاب ذکر مبدا و ماب میفرماید فی الحقیقه ایام
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
